chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – Rolling up of the garments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/339)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/339)
text: نَظَرَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى رَجُلٍ قَدْ لَبِسَ قَمِيصاً يُصِيبُ الْأَرْضَ فَقَالَ مَا هَذَا ثَوْبٌ طَاهِرٌ .

en.hubeali: From him, from his father, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Yahya Al Halby, from Abdul Hameed Al Ta’aiy, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> looked at a man who had worn a shirt which had been hitting the ground, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘These are not clean clothes’.
en.sarwar: 11. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from Yahya al-Halabiy from ‘Abd al-Hamid al-Ta’iy from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has narrated the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, looked at a man who had dressed in a shirt that dragged on the ground. He (the Imam) said, ‘This cloth is not clean.’”
